name: fixtures: running the rule against its positive fixture returns exit 1 (violation; the fixture is genuinely bad)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards" --format json 2>/dev/null && for i in 001; do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/_dispatch.sh" --rule g-react-$i --paths "$PWD//positive/**" 2>/dev/null; code=$?; [ "$code" = "1" ] || { echo "FAIL g-react-$i positive did not trigger (exit $code)" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
setup: mkdir -p positive && printf "\"use client\";\nimport fs from \"node:fs\";\n" > positive/x.tsx
